raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/MainWindow: SB redesign: hide the 'Thinking' reasoning disclosure during replies (texting feel) and quiet the tool-use chip; a component split is tracked follow-up.
Rebase reconciliation applies the pinned swift-format to the main-branch app-detail safety fixes; runtime behavior is unchanged.
Home redesign: chat-as-home surface plus the 2nd-brain knows-list hub replace the wordmark/ribbon/WMN-card layout; a component split is tracked follow-up.
Bridge memory search now awaits the active initial or pagination projection before refreshing, preventing an immediate post-navigation marker search from using stale lifecycle capability state.

The Load-more-tasks action reads displayTasks.last at execution time via loadMoreTapped() instead of force-unwrapping (an emptied list no longer crashes); merged with main binding first-load/loading/error/retry state to the selected To Do or Done view.
SB redesign: adds the hover-expand AppNavRail (icons→labels) and the merged/simplified navigation (Memory, Insights) driving selectedIndex; a component split is tracked follow-up.
